content.raw:
Vancouver AI

A living map of the local AI scene.

This hub collects Kris Krug's field notes from Vancouver and British Columbia's AI ecosystem: meetups, builders, artists, civic conversations, policy questions, and the strange community work of helping people learn in public.

Start here if you want to understand the people, rooms, experiments, and tensions shaping AI on the west coast.

Start here

BC + AI Ecosystem

A community network for builders, creatives, educators, researchers, and public-interest people working on AI in British Columbia.

Visit BC + AI

Events and recaps

Meetups, hackathons, Web Summit field notes, community gatherings, and what actually happened in the room.

Browse AI events

Work in the ecosystem

See the projects, talks, trainings, and community systems that connect Kris's AI work to local culture.

See the work

Field notes

BC AI is live

A community-first note on building the future we actually want.

The long road to Futureproof

What local AI community-building looks like after the hype cycle starts to bite.

Vancouver AI archive

More posts from the local ecosystem, from grassroots meetups to public-interest AI conversations.

Bring Kris into your AI room

For ecosystem strategy, community events, talks, workshops, or a practical read on the local AI scene, start with the room you are trying to build.

Start a conversation
